completed_tasks.name: Plan 01-01: Walking Skeleton — game loop, HTML, CSS, all JS modules
Plan 01-02: XP persistence — PersistenceStore, localStorage save/load
Plan 01-03: Weighted question selection + EWMA accuracy tracking
Plan 01-04: Grunge CSS polish + SVG feTurbulence grain + WCAG verification
Code review fixes — CR-01, CR-02, WR-01, WR-02, WR-03 (5/5 fixed)

remaining_tasks.name: Update roadmap — mark phase 01 complete (gsd-tools query phase.complete)

decisions.decision: SVG feTurbulence grain at baseFrequency=0.9, numOctaves=4, opacity=0.05 via CSS data URI
decisions.rationale: Locked in CONTEXT.md; zero file weight; pure inline; matches grunge aesthetic requirement

decisions.decision: EWMA accuracy tracking drives weighted question selection (70% hard tables 6-9, 30% easy 1-5)
decisions.rationale: Adaptive difficulty prevents memorization while building confidence
Unbiased position randomization prevents answer-location memorization

decisions.decision: fieldset change listener (not click) for answer input
decisions.rationale: Arrow-key radio navigation fires change events, not click events — CR-02 fix
Polite does not interrupt screen reader; assertive would be too aggressive for a game — WR-01 fix

next_action: Run /gsd-autonomous — it will detect phase 01 is all plans done + code review done but unverified (no VERIFICATION.md), spawn gsd-verifier, then run lifecycle (audit → complete → cleanup)
context_notes: All 14 v1 requirements are implemented and code-reviewed. The app is a single HTML file (math-lab.html) ~31KB. Worktree isolation degraded (origin/HEAD unresolved) so the autonomous workflow ran sequentially on the main working tree — this remains the case. STATE.md status is 'verifying' which is correct. The uncommitted files (.planning/ROADMAP.md, STATE.md, config.json, 01-04-SUMMARY.md) contain progress state from the paused autonomous run and should be committed as WIP.
